story: A lonely lighthouse keeper discovers a glowing bottle washed ashore during a storm. Inside is a tiny map leading to a hidden island that appears only under moonlight. She sails into the mist, finds the island, and awakens an ancient crystal that lights the entire sea.

scenes.description: A lonely lighthouse keeper discovers a glowing bottle washed ashore during a storm
Inside is a tiny map leading to a hidden island that appears only under moonlight
She sails into the mist, finds the island, and awakens an ancient crystal
